title: Migrate Linux and PostgreSQL Workloads to Azure
summary: Migrate Linux and PostgreSQL workloads to Azure using Azure Virtual Machines and Azure Database for PostgreSQL.

sections.title: Migrate Linux and PostgreSQL Workloads to Azure
sections.summary: Migrate Linux and PostgreSQL workloads to Azure using Azure Virtual Machines and Azure Database for PostgreSQL.

lessons.title: Migrate Linux and PostgreSQL workloads
lessons.content_md:
Migrate Linux and PostgreSQL workloads to Azure by using an Azure virtual machine and Azure Database for PostgreSQL.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/migrate-linux-postgres/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Introduction to Linux on Azure
lessons.content_md:
This module introduces the services and platforms that Azure provides for Linux environments.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-linux-on-azure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Plan your Linux environment in Azure
lessons.content_md:
Learn about standards and practices for planning, deploying, managing, and optimizing Linux VMs in Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/plan-your-linux-environment-in-azure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Plan your Linux environment in Azure

lessons.title: Provisioning a Linux virtual machine in Microsoft Azure
lessons.content_md:
Learn about different methods of provisioning Linux virtual machines in Microsoft Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/provision-linux-virtual-machine-in-azure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Provisioning a Linux virtual machine in Microsoft Azure

lessons.title: Migrate to Azure Database for PostgreSQL flexible server
lessons.content_md:
Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server supports effective data migration from PostgreSQL servers. This module covers both online and offline migration methods and tools, helping you choose the right approach for your scenario. Learn practical techniques for managing migrations efficiently, ideal for minimizing downtime and maintaining productivity.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/migrate-azure-database-postgresql-flexible-server/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Migrate to Azure Database for PostgreSQL flexible server

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/get-started-generative-ai-azure-database-postgresql/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Get started with generative AI in Azure Database for PostgreSQL

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Migrate Linux and PostgreSQL Workloads to Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Migrate Linux and PostgreSQL Workloads to Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
